hook: Creatine isn't just for muscle; it may boost brain health in women too.

script.hook: Did you know creatine can benefit women beyond just muscle gain?
beats: Most women associate creatine with gym performance, but research shows it may enhance brain function and mood.
Women naturally have lower creatine levels, making them potentially more responsive to supplementation.
Studies suggest creatine can improve cognitive performance, especially during hormonal changes.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Show a woman lifting weights with creatine powder in the background.
Display a brain graphic highlighting energy use.
Include a visual of a woman studying or working, looking focused.
End with a graphic of the BestKarma logo and a soft call to action.

captions.instagram: Creatine may boost brain health in women, not just muscles. Learn more! #creatine #brainhealth
captions.facebook: Discover how creatine can benefit women beyond just muscle gain. #creatine #womenhealth
captions.tiktok: Think creatine is just for the gym? It might help your brain too! #creatine #brainhealth

titles.instagram: Creatine: More Than Muscle for Women
titles.facebook: The Surprising Benefits of Creatine for Women

complianceNotes: Do not imply diagnosis or treatment.
Retain at least one meaningful caveat from the article.
